title: Property Play: Mortgage lenders now have more credit score options. What homebuyers should know
summary: Mortgage lenders are adopting VantageScore 4.0, a credit scoring model that incorporates previously unconsidered consumer data, offering homebuyers more options beyond the traditional decades-old scoring system. This development could impact mortgage accessibility and rates for borrowers.
content: Lenders are beginning to use VantageScore 4.0, which factors in consumer data not currently considered in the score that's been used with mortgages for decades.

zh.title: 房贷新选择：抵押贷款机构推出更多信用评分选项。购房者需要了解什么
zh.summary: 抵押贷款机构正在采用VantageScore 4.0，这是一种信用评分模型，它融合了以前未被考虑的消费者数据，为购房者提供了超越传统数十年评分系统的更多选择。这一发展可能会影响借款人的抵押贷款可及性和利率。

title: India's Modi tightens political grip with historic state victory — but can it usher in reforms and draw investors?
summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi's party achieved a historic victory in recent state elections, reassuring markets about his political durability and positioning him to potentially pursue economic reforms. The win may signal renewed investor confidence in India's political stability.
content: The victory of Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi's political party in state polls dispels worries about his waning popularity, analysts said.

zh.title: 印度莫迪以历史性州选胜利加强政治控制——但它能否带来改革并吸引投资者？
zh.summary: 总理纳伦德拉·莫迪的政党在最近的州选举中取得了历史性胜利，让市场对其政治耐久性感到放心，并使他有可能追求经济改革。此次胜利可能预示着投资者对印度政治稳定性的信心恢复。

title: Here are Tuesday's biggest analyst calls: Apple, Tesla, CoreWeave, Amazon, Palantir, Home Depot & more
summary: Major Wall Street analysts issued significant calls on Tuesday affecting prominent companies including Apple, Tesla, CoreWeave, Amazon, Palantir, and Home Depot. These analyst moves often signal market sentiment shifts and can influence stock valuations.
content: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Tuesday.

zh.title: 周二最大的分析师看法：苹果、特斯拉、CoreWeave、亚马逊、Palantir、家得宝等公司
zh.summary: 周二，华尔街主要分析师对包括苹果、特斯拉、CoreWeave、亚马逊、Palantir和家得宝等知名公司发表了重要看法。这些分析师的举动通常预示着市场情绪的转变，并可能影响股票估值。

title: Coinbase cuts headcount by 14% citing AI acceleration. The shares are gaining
summary: Coinbase is reducing its workforce by approximately 14%, attributing the cuts to market volatility and the accelerating impact of AI on its operations. The market has responded positively to the announcement, with shares gaining on the news.
content: Coinbase will cut roughly 14% of its workforce, citing a combination of market volatility and the how AI is quickly changing how the company operates.

zh.title: Coinbase削减14%员工规模，归因于AI加速。股票上涨
zh.summary: Coinbase正在裁员约14%，将此决定归因于市场波动和AI对其运营的加速影响。市场对该公告反应积极，股票因此上涨。

title: Michael Burry sells GameStop after Ryan Cohen's hefty eBay bid: 'Never confuse debt for creativity'
summary: Renowned investor Michael Burry has exited his GameStop position, citing concerns about Ryan Cohen's proposed eBay acquisition due to its excessive leverage. Burry's departure suggests the financial structure of the deal undermines the operational turnaround thesis that initially attracted investors.
content: The "Big Short" investor said the proposed deal's enormous leverage shattered the investment case he had been building.

zh.title: 迈克尔·伯里在瑞恩·科恩高价eBay报价后抛售GameStop："永远不要将债务与创意混为一谈"
zh.summary: 著名投资者迈克尔·伯里已退出其GameStop头寸，理由是对瑞恩·科恩拟议的eBay收购的高杠杆结构感到担忧。伯里的离场表明该交易的财务结构破坏了最初吸引投资者的运营转机假设。

title: An attractive entry point has emerged in this name tied to AI data centers, says JPMorgan
summary: JPMorgan identifies Cogent Communications, an AI data center infrastructure company, as presenting an attractive investment opportunity despite weak first-quarter results. The company's balance sheet improvements position it for recovery as data center demand continues to surge.
content: Cogent Communications is strengthening its balance sheet after a lackluster first-quarter earnings report, positioning it to regain ground, per JPMorgan.

zh.title: 摩根大通表示，与AI数据中心相关的这只股票出现了吸引人的入场点
zh.summary: 摩根大通将与AI数据中心基础设施相关的Cogent Communications确定为一个具有吸引力的投资机会，尽管第一季度财报表现较弱。该公司资产负债表的改善使其能够在数据中心需求持续飙升的背景下实现复苏。

title: AI productivity gains, the case for Europe & underweight Japan: Three investment strategies from the studio
summary: Investment experts outline three strategic recommendations including capitalizing on AI productivity gains, overweighting European markets, and maintaining underweight positions in Japan. These allocation strategies reflect shifting global growth expectations driven by AI adoption and regional economic performance.

zh.title: AI生产力收益、欧洲投资案例和日本低配置：工作室的三大投资策略
zh.summary: 投资专家提出了三项战略建议，包括利用AI生产力收益、增加欧洲市场配置和维持日本市场低配置。这些配置策略反映了由AI采用和地区经济表现驱动的全球增长预期转变。

title: ‘Like 10 Manhattan Projects going off all at once’: AI is rewiring the entire global economy, says this BlackRock exec
summary: BlackRock's technology chief Tony Kim warns that AI is fundamentally transforming the global economy at an unprecedented scale, comparing the disruption to multiple Manhattan Projects occurring simultaneously. His remarks highlight the pervasive economic impact of AI across industries and geographies.
content: The head of BlackRock’s fundamental equities global technology team, Tony Kim, says AI is rewiring the global economy, and that will just keep going.

zh.title: "如同10个曼哈顿计划同时进行"：AI正在重新布线全球经济，黑石集团高管如此表示
zh.summary: 黑石集团技术主管托尼·金警告称，AI正以前所未有的规模从根本上改变全球经济，将这种破坏与多个同时发生的曼哈顿计划相提并论。他的言论强调了AI在各个行业和地区的广泛经济影响。

title: Taylor Sheridan wrote almost every word of ‘Yellowstone.’ Can its spinoff ‘Dutton Ranch’ succeed without him?
summary: Creator Taylor Sheridan, who wrote virtually all of Yellowstone, is not involved in penning the new spinoff Dutton Ranch, raising questions about whether the franchise can maintain its critical and commercial success without his creative leadership. The situation tests whether the show's appeal relies on Sheridan's unique storytelling or the established characters and universe.
content: He’s written hit after hit, but Sheridan is not involved in writing the primary ‘Yellowstone’ sequel — and that could test of his magic touch.

zh.title: 泰勒·谢里丹几乎创作了《黄石》的每一个字。其衍生剧《达顿庄园》没有他能成功吗？
zh.summary: 创作者泰勒·谢里丹曾几乎创作了《黄石》的全部内容，但他不参与新衍生剧《达顿庄园》的编剧工作，这引发了关于该系列在没有他的创意领导下是否能保持批评和商业成功的疑问。这种情况考验了该剧的吸引力是否依赖于谢里丹独特的叙事风格，还是取决于既有的人物和世界观。

title: This gold-timing indicator just hit a bottom — and history says a strong rally is next
summary: A key gold market timing indicator has reached its lowest point, and historical patterns suggest a significant rally could follow as pessimism reaches extremes. The contrarian setup indicates that widespread investor capitulation in gold may present a bullish opportunity.
content: Gold and gold miners perform best right after investors give up. This “extreme pessimism” is the contrarian tailwind the market has been waiting for.

zh.title: 黄金时机指标刚刚触底——历史表明强劲反弹即将来临
zh.summary: 关键的黄金市场时机指标已经触及最低点，历史模式表明随着悲观情绪达到极端，可能会出现显著反弹。这个反向设置表明黄金投资者广泛投降可能会带来看涨机会。

title: Ferrari tops Wall Street's first-quarter expectations ahead of EV debut
summary: Ferrari exceeded Wall Street's first-quarter earnings expectations and reaffirmed its full-year guidance, demonstrating strong financial performance ahead of its planned electric vehicle launch. The results bolster confidence in the luxury automaker's strategy and execution.
content: Ferrari NV on Tuesday beat Wall Street's first quarter earnings expectations and reconfirmed its guidance for the year.

zh.title: 法拉利在电动汽车推出前超越华尔街第一季度预期
zh.summary: 法拉利超越了华尔街的第一季度盈利预期，并重申了全年指导，在计划推出电动汽车前展示了强劲的财务表现。这些结果增强了对这家豪华汽车制造商战略和执行的信心。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Palantir Technologies, PayPal, Intel, Anheuser-Busch InBev & more
summary: Several major stocks including Palantir Technologies, PayPal, Intel, and Anheuser-Busch InBev are experiencing significant premarket movements, signaling market sentiment ahead of the opening bell. These early moves often foreshadow broader market trends and investor appetite for specific sectors.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in early trading.

zh.title: 盘前涨跌幅最大的股票：Palantir Technologies、PayPal、Intel、百威英博及更多
zh.summary: 包括Palantir Technologies、PayPal、Intel和百威英博在内的多只主要股票正经历盘前大幅波动，预示着开盘前的市场情绪。这些早期走势通常会预示更广泛的市场趋势和投资者对特定板块的兴趣。

title: Anheuser-Busch InBev volumes rose just 1%, and the stock market is delighted.
summary: Anheuser-Busch InBev shares surged despite reporting minimal volume growth of just 0.8% in the first quarter, suggesting the market rewarded the company's cost discipline or margin performance. The positive market reaction indicates investor relief at stabilization in an otherwise challenging consumer spending environment.
content: Anheuser-Busch InBev shares surged on Tuesday as the brewer of Budweiser, Corona and Michelob reported volume growth of 0.8% in the first quarter.

zh.title: 百威英博销量仅增长1%,股市却欣喜若狂
zh.summary: 百威英博股票价格飙升,尽管一季度销量增长仅为0.8%,这表明市场对该公司的成本控制或利润率表现表示认可。这种积极的市场反应反映了投资者对公司在消费支出疲软环境中实现稳定的欣慰。

title: Crypto exchange Bullish to buy Equiniti for $4.2 billion in capital markets push
summary: Cryptocurrency exchange Bullish is acquiring transfer agent Equiniti for $4.2 billion in a strategic move to build capital markets infrastructure and expand its service offerings. The deal positions Bullish to offer more comprehensive solutions to institutional and retail crypto investors.
content: ⁠Bullish said on Tuesday it will buy transfer agent Equiniti in a deal valued at $4.2 billion, as the cryptocurrency exchange looks to establish infrastructure.

zh.title: 加密交易所Bullish以42亿美元收购Equiniti,推进资本市场业务
zh.summary: 加密货币交易所Bullish以42亿美元的价格收购证券转让代理Equiniti,以此作为战略举措来建立资本市场基础设施并扩展服务范围。该交易使Bullish能够为机构和零售加密投资者提供更加全面的解决方案。

title: We are retirees. Are we too old to take out a mortgage in Pennsylvania so we can escape the Florida heat?
summary: Retirees in their late 60s and 70s are considering taking out a mortgage in Pennsylvania to relocate from Florida, raising questions about debt levels in retirement and the practical implications of refinancing in later years. The query highlights the growing trend of climate-driven relocation among seniors seeking to escape Florida's heat.
content: “We are 66 and 76, respectively. We own our home, which is paid off.”

zh.title: 我们是退休人士。我们年纪太大,不能在宾州申请抵押贷款来逃离佛罗里达的炎热吗?
zh.summary: 六七十岁的退休人士正考虑在宾州申请抵押贷款并从佛罗里达州迁居,这引发了人们对退休期间债务水平和晚年再融资的实际影响的思考。这个问题凸显了老年人为了逃离佛罗里达炎热而进行气候驱动迁居的日益增长的趋势。

title: Australia hikes rates again and warns inflation will stay higher for longer
summary: Australia's central bank raised interest rates again amid persistent inflationary pressures stemming from increased commodity prices linked to Middle East tensions. Higher inflation is expected to persist longer than previously anticipated.
content: Inflation had picked up materially in the second half of 2025, and the conflict in the Middle East had resulted in sharply higher fuel and commodity prices.

zh.title: 澳大利亚再次加息，警告通胀将保持高位更久
zh.summary: 澳大利亚央行在持续通胀压力中再次上调利率，该压力源于与中东紧张局势相关的商品价格上升。预计高通胀将比之前预期持续更长时间。

title: European stocks set to open lower as Iran war concerns grow
summary: European stock markets are anticipated to decline as geopolitical tensions escalate with Iran war developments affecting investor sentiment and market positioning. The conflict poses risks to regional stability and economic activity.
content: European stocks are expected to open lower on Tuesday as investors digest the latest developments in the Iran war.

zh.title: 欧洲股市因伊朗战争担忧加剧而将低开
zh.summary: 随着伊朗战争事态升级导致地缘政治紧张局势加剧，欧洲股市预期将下跌，影响投资者情绪和市场仓位。该冲突对地区稳定和经济活动构成风险。

title: HSBC shares drop as first-quarter pre-tax profit misses estimates on higher expected credit losses
summary: HSBC reported first-quarter pre-tax profit of $9.4 billion, slightly below analyst expectations due to increased provisions for credit losses. The shortfall signals growing concerns about loan quality in the bank's portfolio.
content: Europe's largest lender HSBC on Tuesday reported first-quarter pre-tax profit of $9.4 billion, marginally missing analysts' estimates.

zh.title: 汇丰银行股价下跌，一季度税前利润因预期信贷损失增加而不及预期
zh.summary: 汇丰报告一季度税前利润为94亿美元，由于信贷损失准备金增加，略低于分析师预期。该不足反映了市场对该行贷款质量越来越多的担忧。

title: American pilots union chief says United CEO's merger idea showed 'bold vision'
summary: United Airlines abandoned its merger pursuit with American Airlines after the latter declined to engage in negotiations. The pilots union chief characterized the failed attempt as a bold strategic idea despite its unsuccessful outcome.
content: United said last month it had ended its pursuit of a merger with American after the rival carrier declined to engage following an initial approach.

zh.title: 美国飞行员工会主席称美联航首席执行官的并购想法展现了"大胆愿景"
zh.summary: 美联航在美国航空公司拒绝参与谈判后放弃了并购追求。飞行员工会主席将这次失败的尝试表征为一个大胆的战略理念，尽管其最终未成功。

title: 'Vodafone sold us a dream - the reality was something different'
summary: Sixty-two former Vodafone franchisees have filed a lawsuit against the company, citing a significant gap between promised and actual business outcomes. The legal action highlights franchisee grievances over misaligned expectations.
content: Two women from Lincolnshire are among 62 former franchisees taking the phone company to court.

zh.title: '沃达丰给我们兜售的是梦想——现实却完全不同'
zh.summary: 六十二名前沃达丰特许经营商对该公司提起诉讼，声称承诺的业务成果与实际情况之间存在巨大差距。该诉讼突出了特许经营商对期望不符的不满。

title: US strikes Iranian fast boats as Iran attacks UAE oil facility
summary: Following an Iranian attack on UAE oil infrastructure, the US military struck Iranian boats in the Strait of Hormuz while protecting commercial shipping. The escalation demonstrates ongoing regional military tensions affecting critical global trade routes.
content: Shipping company Maersk says one of its US-flagged commercial vessels has successfully exited the Strait of Hormuz under US military protection.

zh.title: 伊朗袭击阿联酋石油设施之际，美国轰击伊朗快速艇
zh.summary: 在伊朗袭击阿联酋油基础设施后，美军在霍尔木兹海峡轰击伊朗快速艇，同时保护商业航运。这次升级表明了正在进行的地区军事紧张局势对关键全球贸易路线的影响。

title: Secret Service officer arrested for indecent exposure in Miami after Trump golf event
summary: A Secret Service officer was arrested for indecent exposure following a Trump golf event in Miami and has been placed on administrative leave. The incident raises questions about personnel conduct standards within the protective service.
content: Secret Service Officer John Spillman has been placed on administrative leave after his arrest, which in Miami.

zh.title: 特朗普高尔夫活动后，特勤特工因在迈阿密猥亵暴露被捕
zh.summary: 一名特勤特工在特朗普高尔夫活动后因在迈阿密猥亵暴露罪被捕，已被停职接受行政审查。该事件引发了对保护性服务部门人员行为操守标准的质疑。

title: Your Spirit loyalty points are probably worthless now — but these other airlines may match your rewards
summary: Spirit Airlines customers face losing their accumulated loyalty points following the airline's collapse, with minimal compensation prospects. Alternative carriers may offer partial rewards matching to mitigate customer losses from the defunct carrier.
content: Loyal customers who amassed thousands of points through flight purchases and credit-card swipes might not see a penny in compensation for their accumulated rewards.

zh.title: 你的Spirit航空忠诚度积分现在可能一文不值——但这些其他航空公司可能会匹配你的奖励
zh.summary: Spirit航空公司倒闭后，客户面临失去累积的常客积分，补偿前景渺茫。其他航空公司可能会提供部分奖励匹配，以缓解客户的损失。

title: BYD's passenger EV sales drop for an eighth month as competition heats up
summary: BYD's electric vehicle sales continued their decline for the eighth consecutive month as competition intensifies in China's crowded EV market. Competitors like Leapmotor are gaining ground with strong delivery numbers.
content: BYD's deliveries fell for an eighth straight month in April, while Stellantis-backed Leapmotor logged a record number of deliveries

zh.title: 随着竞争升温，比亚迪乘用电动汽车销售连续第八个月下降
zh.summary: 随着中国拥挤的电动汽车市场竞争加剧，比亚迪的电动汽车销售持续下跌，这已是连续第八个月。零跑等竞争对手凭借强劲的交付数字不断蚕食市场份额。

title: Top Democrat aims for New York redistricting after Supreme Court’s Voting Rights ruling
summary: Following a Supreme Court decision that eliminated a majority-Black Louisiana congressional district, Democrats are pushing for New York redistricting to protect minority representation. The ruling has prompted multiple states to reconsider their electoral maps.
content: Democrats are vowing to fight back after the Supreme Court eliminated a majority-Black Louisiana House district, as more states look to redraw maps.

zh.title: 最高法院投票权裁决后，民主党领导人瞄准纽约重新划分选区
zh.summary: 在最高法院裁定消除了路易斯安那州黑人占多数的国会选区后，民主党正在推动纽约重新划分选区以保护少数族裔代表权。该裁决促使多个州重新审视其选举地图。

title: British pubs closing at a rate of almost two per day in 2026
summary: British pubs are closing at an accelerating rate with 161 closures in the first quarter of 2026, equating to approximately two per day. The trend reflects ongoing challenges in the hospitality sector and changing consumer behaviors.
content: The British Beer and Pub Association says 161 pubs have closed in the first three months of this year.

zh.title: 2026年英国酒吧以平均每天近两家的速度关闭
zh.summary: 英国酒吧关闭速度不断加快，2026年第一季度有161家关闭，相当于每天约两家。这一趋势反映了酒店业持续面临的挑战和消费者行为的变化。

title: Andy Jassy says Amazon investors will be rewarded by all its AI spending
summary: CEO Andy Jassy emphasized that Amazon's massive AI investments represent a once-in-a-generation opportunity for the company. He argued that this spending will ultimately deliver substantial returns to shareholders. Jassy's comments signal confidence in AI's long-term value creation despite near-term financial pressure.
content: CEO Andy Jassy said Amazon’s massive AI spending reflects a once-in-a-generation opportunity and will ultimately reward investors.

zh.title: 安迪·贾西表示亚马逊投资者将因所有AI支出而获得回报
zh.summary: 首席执行官安迪·贾西强调，亚马逊的大规模AI投资代表了公司千载难逢的机会。他辩称，这笔支出最终将为股东带来实质性回报。贾西的言论表明，尽管面临短期财务压力，但他对AI长期价值创造充满信心。

title: Oil slides as traders assess Middle East developments with Iran attacks keeping markets jittery
summary: Oil prices declined Tuesday as traders reassessed the impact of recent Middle East tensions and Iran-related developments on global energy markets. The pullback reversed sharp gains from the previous session as uncertainty over the geopolitical situation persists. Investors remain cautious about future energy supply disruptions.
content: Oil prices declined on Tuesday, retreating from sharp gains in the previous session.

zh.title: 交易员评估中东局势，伊朗攻击令市场紧张之际石油下滑
zh.summary: 周二油价下跌，交易员重新评估最近中东紧张局势和伊朗相关事态对全球能源市场的影响。随着地缘政治局势的不确定性持续存在，跌幅逆转了前一交易日的大幅上涨。投资者对未来能源供应中断仍保持谨慎态度。

title: Palantir posts its fastest revenue growth ever while calling out ‘AI slop’
summary: Palantir reported earnings that exceeded expectations, posting record revenue growth fueled by explosive demand in its core U.S. market. The company also criticized what it calls "AI slop"—low-quality, mass-produced AI implementations—reflecting tensions within the broader AI industry. Palantir's expansion underscores strong enterprise adoption of its data analytics platform.
content: Palantir earnings beat expectations on the heels of explosive demand in the company’s core U.S. market.

zh.title: Palantir创造有史以来最快的收入增长，同时批评"AI垃圾"
zh.summary: Palantir报告的收益超出预期，创造了创纪录的收入增长，由其核心美国市场的爆炸性需求推动。公司还批评了它所称的"AI垃圾"——低质量、大批量生产的AI实现——反映了更广泛AI行业内的紧张关系。Palantir的扩展强调了其数据分析平台的强大企业采用。
